author: jsign
content:
[New public and live R2 dataset for `glamsterdam-devnet-7` devnet](https://pub-df22334654034ebab51bc096137a59d8.r2.dev/devnets/glamsterdam-devnet-7/index.html)
It contains benchmark-ready EEST fixtures generated from live blocks on the active `glamsterdam-devnet-7`, aligned with the `tests-zkevm@v0.6.2` release. 
Notes:
- The per-block export format was redesigned to match the canonical EEST blockchain-test fixture format. This avoids introducing another project-specific format (as we had in the previous R2 bucket). So be sure to double-check your CI if you were using the prev glamsterdam-devnet-5 R2 bucket.
- As a result, `zkevm-benchmark-workload` can use the same ingestion path for EEST test fixtures and live devnet blocks. This gives testing, benchmarking, and offline proving a single canonical fixture format (EEST `blockchain_test`), without an intermediate conversion step. Main goal here is to minimise the introduced tools, fixture formats, etc.
